monday.description: Pan-seared clams and dried oyster mushrooms come together with corn tortillas and a hint of Calabrian chili paste, all tied together by a quick sauté.

tuesday.description: Free-range whole duck is slow-cooked with Hatch chiles and served atop Pad Thai rice noodles, finished with a sprinkle of smoked salt.

wednesday.description: Pork loin is roasted and served with Mantou bread and sautéed spring onions, all brought together by a drizzle of red miso paste.

thursday.description: Organic chicken tenders are marinated and grilled, then wrapped in gluten-free sopes with Anaheim peppers and a dollop of low-fat goat milk yogurt.

friday.description: Grass-fed beef cheek is slow-cooked and served with pumpkin ravioli and sautéed nopales, finished with a sprinkle of dried lemongrass.

monday.description: Sliced truffle cheese is baked with gluten-free spaghetti and organic yams, all smothered in a rich cream of mushroom sauce.

tuesday.description: Organic pea protein crumbles are stir-fried with Maitake mushrooms and served with kulcha bread, finished with a sprinkle of Sansho pepper.

wednesday.description: Gouda cheese is melted and served with gluten-free bhatura bread and sautéed organic red onions, all brought together by a drizzle of olive tapenade.

thursday.description: Marzipan nuts are toasted and served with sopes bread and sautéed organic Swiss chard, all finished with a sprinkle of ground Sichuan peppercorns.

friday.description: Triple-cream Brie cheese is melted and served with gluten-free pici pasta and sautéed jalapeno peppers, all finished with a drizzle of pumpkin seed oil.
